# Infographic Prompt — Attention Is All You Need

*Generated by paper-summary Step 3-4. Ready to feed into any image generation backend.*

---

```markdown
Create a vertical 2:3 infographic summarizing this research paper.

Style: modern infographic, clean white background, restrained color palette
Language: English

Content blocks (from top to bottom, 2:3 aspect ratio, 1080x1620px):

1. TITLE AREA (15% — top)
   - Title: "Attention Is All You Need" (bold, 48pt sans-serif, dark navy #1e3a5f)
   - Subtitle: "Transformer — Sequence Transduction Without RNNs" (24pt, gray #6b7280)
   - Authors: "Vaswani et al. · NeurIPS 2017" (18pt, lighter gray)

2. PROBLEM STATEMENT (10%)
   - Icon: small cross icon or cycle symbol
   - "Problem: RNNs process tokens sequentially → slow training, long paths"
   - One short phrase, left aligned, dark text

3. METHOD OVERVIEW — THE KEY VISUAL (35% — center, most space)
   - Show simplified Transformer architecture HORIZONTALLY:
   ```
   [Input Embedding] → [Self-Attention] → [Feed-Forward] → [Output]
   [Position Encoding] ↗                    repeated N×
   ```
   - Style: clean vector, rounded rectangles, connected by arrows
   - Highlight SELF-ATTENTION box with accent color (#2563eb blue)
   - Label inside each box with 2-3 words max
   - No complex details — just the high-level flow
   - Key annotation next to Self-Attention: "QKV · Parallel · O(1) paths"

4. KEY NUMBERS (25%)
   Three large data callouts side by side, each with a big number + short label:
   
   ┌─────────────────┬──────────────────┬──────────────────┐
   │    28.4 BLEU     │  3.5 days train  │   O(1) path      │
   │   Translation    │  8 GPU (60h)     │   Any→Any        │
   │   New SOTA       │   vs weeks       │   vs RNN O(n)    │
   └─────────────────┴──────────────────┴──────────────────┘
   
   - Numbers: 56pt bold, accent color (#2563eb)
   - Labels: 16pt, dark gray (#374151)

5. CONTRIBUTIONS (10%)
   Three bullet points in a row:
   • Self-Attention: global dependencies without recurrence
   • Multi-Head: parallel subspaces for richer relations
   • Position Encoding: order information without RNN

6. BOTTOM BAR (5%)
   - Paper info: "arXiv:1706.03762 · Open source: Tensor2Tensor"
   - Small QR code placeholder or DOI link

Visual constraints:
- All text readable at screen size (minimum 14pt)
- Main architecture flow diagram must occupy the center 35% area
- Clean white background (#ffffff), no paper texture
- One accent color only: #2563eb (blue)
- Do NOT generate fake data, fake charts, or fake numbers
- Do NOT generate logos, watermarks, page numbers, or decorative borders
- Total text on image: max 200 characters
- Sans-serif typography throughout (Inter or SF Pro style)
```

## 使用说明

将以上 prompt 复制到支持 image generation 的工具中：

| 工具 | 命令/操作 |
|------|----------|
| **Codex imagegen** | 直接粘贴 prompt |
| **Midjourney** | `/imagine` + prompt（去掉代码格式） |
| **DALL-E 3** | 直接粘贴 |
| **Flux Pro** | 直接在 prompt 框粘贴 |
| **Claude + baoyu-image-gen** | 调用 image gen skill 传入 prompt |

## 预期输出规格

| 属性 | 值 |
|------|-----|
| 尺寸 | 1080×1620px (2:3) |
| 格式 | PNG |
| 风格 | 现代简洁信息图 |
| 配色 | 白色底 + 深蓝 #1e3a5f + 强调蓝 #2563eb |
| 可读性 | 手机屏幕直接可读 |
